verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Someone is praying for you Someone is praying for you So when it seems you're all alone And your heart will break in two Remember someone is praying for you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Have the crowds 'round you gathered in the midst of the storm? Is your ship tossed and battered, are you weary and worn? Don't lose hope, someone's praying for you this very day And peace be still is already on the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When it seems that you've prayed 'til your strength is all gone And your tears fall like raindrops all the day long He cares and He knows just how much you can bear He'll speak your name to someone in prayer

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Someone is praying for you Someone is praying for you So when it seems you're all alone And your heart will break in two Remember someone is praying for you Remember someone is praying for you
